case_title: C & C OF SF OFFICE OF TRESURER TAX COLLECTOR VS. CURTIS SANDEFORD

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF C & C OF SF OFFICE OF TRESURER TAX COLLECTOR
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-22-2017 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF C & C OF SF OFFICE OF TRESURER TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SANDEFORD, CURTIS $3,826.72 PRINCIPAL, $135.97 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,962.69 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF C & C OF SF OFFICE OF TRESURER TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT SANDEFORD, CURTIS
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO ALAMEDA COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF C & C OF SF OFFICE OF TRESURER TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT SANDEFORD, CURTIS
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO ALAMEDA COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $2,038.95 RETURNED MISSING PAGE 3 OF WRIT AS TO DEFENDANT SANDEFORD, CURTIS
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $85.97) SERVED DEC-28-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT SANDEFORD, CURTIS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,826.72 FILED BY C & C OF SF OFFICE OF TRESURER TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT SANDEFORD, CURTIS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-22-2017 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-22-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-22-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF C & C OF SF OFFICE OF TRESURER TAX COLLECTOR IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY CHARLENE HASTINGS, SENIOR COLLECTIONS OFFICER. DEFENDANT CURTIS SANDEFORD IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $312.67 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT SANDEFORD, CURTIS
